## 📖 About The Project

The **Auto Job Applier** is built to save you time. It features a beautiful, responsive frontend and a robust Express application backed by SQLite to store and seamlessly manage all your user data and job applications.

### 🛠️ Built With

- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express.js
- **Database**: SQLite3
- **DevOps**: Docker, ESLint, Prettier, GitHub Actions

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

To get a local copy up and running, follow these simple steps.

### Prerequisites

Make sure you have [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) and npm installed on your system.
If you prefer containerization, you will require [Docker](https://www.docker.com/).

### Installation

1. **Clone the repo**
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/preethamboreddy-sudo/AutoJobApplier.git
   cd AutoJobApplier
   ```
2. **Install NPM packages**
   ```bash
   npm install
   ```
3. **Run the server**
   ```bash
   npm start
   ```

### 🐳 Docker Setup

You can run the application seamlessly using Docker without local Node environment:

```bash
docker compose up --build
```

The application will be accessible at `http://localhost:3000`.
